name: ai-heroes-travel-agent
description: Full multi-agent travel system by AI Heroes with deep intelligence features. Plans trips end-to-end: flights, trains, ferries, accommodation, activities. Proactive transport mode selection, reasoning transparency on every recommendation, loyalty programme intelligence, post-booking price re-shopping, document scanning (boarding passes, receipts, hotel bills), expense tracking and reports. Parallel agent search, persistent memory learning, price monitoring, pre-trip reminders, trip packs, Gmail booking detection, Google Calendar integration. Live-verified prices, anti-hallucination guardrails, family-aware policies.
